prompt: Estimate or interpret the measurable condition and state why it is out of tolerance.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-304 Wire pulling (feeders & branch) within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.3 Wire & Cable. The observed field condition is: phase tape colors wrong. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC 200.6, 210.5 (identification). The measurable cue is visible enough to estimate whether the condition is within tolerance.
title: T2 E-304 Measurement & estimation
